## How I tested it

<!-- Commands run, manual checks. For dashboard changes, attach screenshots. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check src dashboard tests` is clean
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, `storage_state.json`, `*.maFile`, `data/`)
- [ ] Updated README / CONTRIBUTING if behavior or commands changed
- [ ] Screenshots attached if the dashboard changed
